creator: sadsfae@funcamp.net
text:
I can confirm I am getting this error too on 9.2-RELEASE-p9 and latest 2014-07-08 ports with cups-base-1.7.3 (where cupsd.conf and cups-browsed.conf where split out).

--snip--
